title: BOSKA Cheese Knives Copenhagen - 4 Cheese Knives - Small Cutlery - for All Types of Cheese - Butter Knife - Stainless Steel - Silver - Dishwasher Safe
features: CHEESE KNIFE SET: With this complete cheese knife set you are ready for any occasion. From soft brie to hard parmigiano: these knives will cut any cheese down to size.
BOSKA MINI: The BOSKA MINI collection consists of full-fledged knives in a small format. Especially for use at the table or on the appetizer board
Stainless steel: The Copenhagen cheese knives are completely made of stainless steel and are extremely strong. Do not be afraid to cut up even the hardest cheese
CLEANING: These cheese knives are dishwasher safe: extra easy to clean.
A GIFT FOR LIFE: BOSKA offers you durable and affordable Food Tools that last a lifetime, of exceptional quality, perfect as a gift, and with a timeless design
